user.title: Set up UrDash
user.description: Configure the OpenAI-compatible provider used by the UrDash card design agent.

data_description.api_key: Stored only in the Home Assistant integration entry and never sent to the browser.
data_description.base_url: Responses API base URL, for example https://api.openai.com/v1. OpenAI-compatible endpoints are supported.
data_description.model: Choose a common model or enter the model ID supported by your endpoint.
